retrieved_result: Dementia's youngest victims defy stereotypes "LEESBURG, Fla. — Doreen Watson-Beard cared for more people with dementia than she could count. The nurse was so moved by her patients that she led Alzheimer's support groups. She knew the warning signs and understood there was no cure. But the 49-year-old never thought the disease would affect some
